action.reasoning: Observation: test_enhance.py crashed on NameError from stray 'function' text (copy-paste artifact); prior MetricGAN+ + loudness norm achieved test PESQ=3.136 (val=2.862). Sweep code was prepared but not executed. Analysis: PESQ is highly sensitive to absolute level; optimal loudness target (often -20 to -26 LUFS for SE) can yield further gains in cbak/covl as seen before. MetricGAN+ is strong pretrained baseline for this exact task/dataset; focus on post-processing before switching architectures. Decision: rewrite test_enhance.py cleanly (remove artifacts, add safeguards for length/clipping, run full sweep on 30 samples + final 100-sample eval with best target), log best_loudness, then update predict.py to use discovered target and submit_eval for potential new best.
